torch_pattern: x = x.reshape(batch, seq_len, hidden_dim // {HEAD_DIM}, {HEAD_DIM}); x = x.permute(0, 2, 1, 3)
applicability_notes: Single-tensor head-split variant (unlike fused QKV variants, operates on one of Q/K/V independently; returns a 1-tuple, callers index [0]). head_dim fixed at 32 in observed usages. K path additionally follows with ttnn.permute(key_layer, (0, 1, 3, 2)) for K^T; that permute is NOT fused into this op. Skipped entirely when num_attention_heads == 1.; torch_pattern_source: test reference: head_dim = 32; heads_num = hidden_dim // head_dim (segformer transpose_for_scores: view(B, S, heads_num, head_dim).permute(0, 2, 1, 3)); ttnn_replacement: ttnn.experimental.nlp_create_qkv_heads_segformer(x, memory_config={MEM_CONFIG})[0]

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, num_heads, seq_len, 32], segformer encoder seq lens (e.g. H*W/{SR}^2)
placement_observations.source: model call site: segformer efficient_selfattention query path (memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, num_heads, kv_seq_len, 32] (kv_seq_len reduced by sr_ratio when sr_ratio>1)
placement_observations.source: model call site: segformer key path (memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG), followed by ttnn.permute(0,1,3,2)
model call site: segformer value path (memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)
model call site: key converted via ttnn.to_memory_config(key, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b) immediately before head split
model call site: value converted via ttnn.to_memory_config(value, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b) immediately before head split
